bugs: The complete command doesn't seem to update the performance tracking in the status output - the performance matrix isn't visible in the status output
confusion: The README doesn't clearly explain how to install the agent_representation_broker dependency
The status output doesn't show the performance matrix that the README mentions
improvements: Add clear installation instructions for dependencies
Include performance matrix in status output
Add more detailed examples in the README
summary: The tool runs and performs basic agent registration and task submission. The adaptive performance tracking appears to be implemented but isn't visible in the status output. The core functionality works but could use better documentation and visibility of the performance features.
